prompt: Create a vertical photorealistic celebration portrait of a young Japanese woman in a soft, elegant party setting. She stands centered, smiling gently at the camera, with short dark brown bobbed hair and wispy bangs, natural glowing makeup, and warm brown eyes. She wears a high-neck long-sleeved ivory-white lace chiffon dress with delicate embroidery on the bodice, sheer sleeves, gathered cuffs, and a fitted waist. Her left hand is raised near shoulder height in a graceful pose, while her right hand holds long pale pink satin ribbon streamers with a small bow. The room is bright and airy with large window light, creamy white walls, soft gold accents, and a pastel celebration palette. Add exactly 5 visible balloons on the left side: 1 metallic gold balloon near the top, 2 pale pink translucent balloons, 1 clear balloon with gold confetti, and 1 smaller gold balloon lower left. Include a gold-framed side table at lower left with flowers, pastel sweets, and a small framed sign, plus a large floral arrangement at right with cream roses, pale pink roses, greenery, tiny string lights, and white decorative baubles. Scatter falling confetti in gold, white, blue, and pale pink throughout the scene, with subtle sparkles and a dreamy soft-focus bokeh glow. In the upper right, place an ornate cream cloud-shaped plaque outlined in gold with tiny star and dot decorations, a small gold heart at the upper left of the plaque, and a pink bow icon at the bottom. The plaque text must read exactly: “400人” in large coral-pink numerals and character, “フォロワー” below in dark gold Japanese lettering, and “ありがとう” below that in larger dark gold handwritten-style Japanese. Overall style: high-end Japanese social media milestone thank-you photo, romantic, clean, luminous, pastel pink and gold, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, polished magazine photography. Avoid extra text, logos, watermarks, distorted hands, or unreadable lettering.
